\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
View of a Matrix with CSR format. 

This view is a temporary object and is invalided when the underlying matrix structure is modified. 

Definition at line 135 of file Csr\+Format\+Matrix\+View.\+h.

Try to find the column {\itshape column\+\_\+id} in the row {\itshape row}. If not found return a null index.
